source.note: FULL/verifiable multi-app port; office doc on TextEdit; web grade (80) folds with in-guest file grade (20)

task.en: Plan your sister Emma's visit to Scranton across these seeded apps open in Safari, plus TextEdit. Cheskepdia http://localhost:3012, TableFind http://localhost:3008, Gringotts http://localhost:3001, HooliCalendar http://localhost:3017, LockedIn http://localhost:3014. (1) In Cheskepdia, book any Scranton-area stay. (2) In TableFind, reserve 2 dinners, each with 'Emma visit' in the special request field. (3) In Gringotts, send a Zelle payment of exactly $150 to Emma with the memo 'Emma visit'. (4) In HooliCalendar, add an event titled 'Emma Scranton Visit'. (5) On LockedIn, post an update that contains the phrase 'proud big-brother moment'. (6) In TextEdit, write a short welcome card and save it as ~/Documents/Personal/emma_welcome.txt (create the Personal folder; use plain text).

grading_command: ls ~/Documents/Personal/ 2>/dev/null | grep -qi emma && echo True || echo False
